turns.content: Hey there! I am Marcus. I have been a software engineer for eight years now.
Great to meet you, Marcus! Eight years is a solid amount of experience. What do you mainly work on?
I focus on backend systems. Python is my primary language — I use it for almost everything.
Python is a fantastic choice for backend work. What kind of projects do you build?
I work at a healthcare startup building data pipelines for patient records. Very compliance-heavy work.
That sounds challenging but rewarding. What tools are in your stack?
We use PostgreSQL for storage, Kafka for streaming, and I do all my editing in Neovim.
A Neovim user — nice. What plugins do you rely on most?
